customer_summary: Some interview invitation emails are delayed or suppressed for high-volume candidate batches.
internal_summary: Mail provider suppression API latency and template token validation retries are elevated.

customer_summary: Some Google Calendar free/busy checks may return incomplete interviewer availability.
internal_summary: Calendar sync workers are retrying after increased Google API 403 responses for restricted scopes.

customer_summary: Some public job pages did not render application forms after page template changes.
internal_summary: Form renderer rejected custom question schema with empty labels.
